summary: Chromatin looping contributes to genome organization and gene regulation, but the retrieved literature provides no specific evidence linking super enhancers to structural insulation via chromatin loops. Consequently, based strictly on the given information, super enhancers are not confirmed to be structurally insulated in chromatin loops. \boxed{B}
